timeline.title: Ages of Eldoria
timeline.description: The complete history of the realm of Eldoria, from the Sundering to the Age of Restoration

events.title: The Sundering
events.description: The world was torn asunder when the Elder Gods clashed, shattering the primordial continent into the five great lands. Mountains rose from the sea, rivers changed course, and the sky burned for a hundred years.

events.title: Founding of Aeloran
events.description: The first Emperor Aelor united the scattered human tribes and established the Aeloran Empire, marking year zero of the Imperial Reckoning.

events.title: The Golden Age
events.description: A period of unprecedented peace and prosperity in the Aeloran Empire. Arts, magic, and scholarship flourished.

events.title: War of the Crowns
events.description: A devastating civil war that nearly tore the empire apart as three claimants fought for the throne.

events.title: Rise of Thalas
events.description: The sea-king Thalas conquered the coastal cities and founded the Thalassian Dominion, establishing dominance over the eastern seas.

events.title: The Sea Wars
events.description: A series of naval conflicts between the Thalassian Dominion and the pirate kingdoms of the Shattered Isles.

events.title: The Great Eclipse
events.description: A total eclipse that lasted three days, during which strange creatures emerged from the shadows. Celebrated and feared across all cultures.

events.title: The Awakening
events.description: The Sylvari elves emerged from their millennia-long communion with the World Tree, forming the Confederation of the Silver Leaves.

events.title: The Bloom Wars
events.description: Territorial conflicts with the expanding human empires over the sacred groves.

events.title: The Dark Age
events.description: A time of plague, famine, and darkness that affected all civilizations. Magic waned, and many ancient secrets were lost.

events.title: The Grand Alliance
events.description: For the first time in history, all three great powers signed a treaty of mutual defense against the rising threat from the Shadowlands.
